steps.title: Identify the Unit Conversion
steps.content: To convert feet to yards, we use the given relationship: 3 feet = 1 yard. Therefore, to convert a speed from feet per second to yards per second, we divide by 3.

steps.title: Calculate the Speed in Yards per Second
steps.content: Apply the conversion:$$\frac{3}{17} \text{ feet per second} \div 3 = \frac{3}{17} \times \frac{1}{3} = \frac{3}{51} = \frac{1}{17}$$The speed is $\frac{1}{17}$ yards per second, which is approximately 0.0588 yards per second.
